chart.name: chart.seo.registration.statuses
chart.title: Registration statuses
chart.dataset: SELECT 'Количество регистраций' AS registration_status, COUNT(*) AS amount FROM seo_registration reg WHERE (archived IS NULL OR archived = false) AND DATE(reg.created_on) BETWEEN DATE(:fromDate) AND DATE(:toDate) AND ((reg.ccp = :ccp) OR (:fullInfo = true)) UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN reg.registration_status = 'pending' THEN 'В ожидании' WHEN reg.registration_status = 'formulation' THEN 'Оформление' WHEN reg.registration_status = 'arrived' THEN 'Прибыл' WHEN reg.registration_status = 'called' THEN 'Вызван' WHEN reg.registration_status = 'departed' THEN 'Выехал' WHEN reg.registration_status = 'officialCar' THEN 'Служебное АТС' END AS registration_status, COUNT(*) AS amount FROM seo_registration reg WHERE (archived IS NULL OR archived = false) AND DATE(reg.created_on) BETWEEN DATE(:fromDate) AND DATE(:toDate) AND ((reg.ccp = :ccp) OR (:fullInfo = true)) GROUP BY registration_status

chart.name: chart.seo.registration.queue.type
chart.title: Registration queue type
chart.dataset: SELECT 'Всего' AS queue_type, COUNT(*) AS amount FROM seo_registration reg WHERE (archived IS NULL OR archived = false) AND DATE(reg.created_on) BETWEEN DATE(:fromDate) AND DATE(:toDate) AND ((reg.ccp = :ccp) OR (:fullInfo = true)) UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN reg.queue_type = 'timedQueue' THEN 'По времени' WHEN reg.queue_type = 'liveQueue' THEN 'Живая очередь' END AS queue_type, COUNT(*) AS amount FROM seo_registration reg WHERE (archived IS NULL OR archived = false) AND DATE(reg.created_on) BETWEEN DATE(:fromDate) AND DATE(:toDate) AND ((reg.ccp = :ccp) OR (:fullInfo = true)) GROUP BY queue_type
